title: Evergreen India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Evergreen India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Evergreen India family as a Warehouse Manager in Jodhpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Evergreen India:
Evergreen India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in WMS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Evergreen India!
